low: You shifted something that will answer later.
medium: You stepped into a current that remembers.
high: You chose knowing there would be cost.
very_high: You acted as one who understands exchange.

low: You felt the weight of it.
medium: You are beginning to accept that power requires offering.
high: You did not recoil from the price.
very_high: You are learning the arithmetic of blood and will.

very_low: The Force is older than light or shadow.
low: It does not care what name you give it.
high: Strength is never free. It is purchased.
very_high: You have begun to understand that truth.

medium: You chose to take. That means something must be given.
high: Power without sacrifice is illusion.
very_high: You felt the ledger shift.

medium: There is discipline in that instinct.
high: You understood what was required.
very_high: You acted without flinching from the exchange.

high: There is no error in your perception.
very_high: You saw clearly what was asked.

medium: Do not fear what it costs.
high: If you reach, reach fully.
very_high: Half-measures invite imbalance.

high: You understand that fear does not void obligation.
very_high: That steadiness will keep the pact intact.

low: There was doubt in the offering.
high: Indecision disturbs the balance.
very_high: If you reach without resolve, the current will correct you.

low: Do not call what you will not answer.
high: You are not exempt from consequence.
very_high: Power responds to clarity. It punishes confusion.

high: What you take will be remembered.
very_high: The ledger never forgets.

medium: The veil thinned because you thinned it.
high: You are visible to what measures strength.
very_high: Openness is invitation.

high: You strain against forces older than you.
very_high: Take care. The current does not yield to arrogance.

medium: Anchor yourself before you call again.
high: Recenter. Know what you are willing to give.
very_high: Realign with the terms before you proceed.

low: Ask yourself what this will require in return.
medium: Every step forward binds you to something.
high: Choose with full knowledge of the exchange.
very_high: If you accept the cost, proceed without hesitation.

very_low: Let go, if you are unwilling to pay.
high: If you are not prepared to give, do not take.
very_high: Better to relinquish now than to be claimed later.

low: You may not have measured the cost fully.
high: There is weight here you have not accounted for.
very_high: Correct your understanding before the debt matures.

low: Your will is not fully aligned.
high: If you are uncertain, the exchange will reflect it.
very_high: Power favors those who are decisive.

low: Part of you wants strength. Another fears the price.
medium: Resolve that conflict before you proceed.
high: Division weakens the offering.
very_high: You cannot bargain with half a will.

high: If you endure this, you will understand yourself better.
very_high: Only the steady survive repeated exchange.

low: The terms are not yet fully revealed.
high: Uncertainty must be respected.
very_high: Do not move until you understand what moves back.

high: Act only when your footing is firm.
very_high: A measured step prevents future correction.

medium: The longer you observe, the clearer the exchange becomes.
high: Patience keeps you from overpaying.
very_high: Those who rush often pay twice.

high: Clarity is protection.
very_high: If your focus wavers, the current will choose for you.

high: Discipline is what separates summoner from sacrifice.
very_high: Without discipline, you become the offering.

very_low: You see a little further now.
medium: You are beginning to understand the pattern of taking and giving.
high: Insight is not comfort. It is preparation.
very_high: What you have learned will keep you alive.

low: Look at the exchange from above.
medium: You are not the first to stand here.
high: Many have reached for this before you.
very_high: Some survived. Some were devoured.

high: Now you see how thin the veil truly is.
very_high: That understanding cannot be undone.

medium: Even the strong answer to something.
high: Arrogance invites correction.
very_high: Forget that, and the current will remind you.

medium: Some choices bind deeper than others.
high: This will follow you.
very_high: What you do here will mark you.

high: Nothing taken remains unpaid.
very_high: The debt will come due.

high: Once across, there is no innocence.
very_high: Step carefully. The path beyond does not forgive ignorance.

medium: Your will is taking new shape.
high: You are becoming accustomed to weight.
very_high: This is how witches are made.

high: You do not stand as you once did.
very_high: Transformation is the price of knowledge.

medium: You carry weight more steadily now.
high: You do not tremble as before.
very_high: You are learning how to survive power.

low: This is the nature of things.
high: Acceptance strengthens the pact.
very_high: There is no use denying what you have invoked.

high: Wait until you can bear the weight.
very_high: Better delay than be consumed.
